prompt: I need to add a new line item to the compliant model: Depreciation. It should be 10% of revenue each year. Add it and update EBITDA to account for it — making it EBITDA after depreciation, essentially EBIT.
assertions: Creates Inp_Depreciation_Pct (or similar Inp_ name) = 0.10 as a new assumption
Creates Depreciation_Y1/Y2/Y3 calculations using Named Ranges only
Either updates EBITDA to subtract depreciation OR creates separate EBIT Named Ranges
Uses idfa-ops create-range and write commands
The modified model's formula chain remains intact and internally consistent
Reports expected values for the new line items (Depreciation_Y1 ≈ $1M, EBIT_Y1 ≈ $1M)
